name: OMEGA HEALTHCARE INVESTORS INC
business: Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. invests in healthcare-related real estate properties, primarily skilled nursing facilities, assisted living facilities, and other healthcare facilities, and provides financing to healthcare operators under triple-net leases, real estate loans, and RIDEA structures.

exposures.sentence: Our investment portfolio primarily consists of skilled nursing facilities (SNFs), assisted living facilities (ALFs), including care homes in the U.K., independent living facilities (ILFs), rehabilitation and acute care facilities (specialty facilities) and continuing care retirement communities (CCRCs).

A significant portion of our operators revenue is derived from government-funded reimbursement programs, consisting primarily of Medicare and Medicaid in the U.S. and local authority funding in the U.K.

catalysts.sentence: We repaid $400 million of 4.50% senior notes on the January 15, 2025 maturity date using available cash.
Omega repaid the $50 million term loan (OP Term Loan) on April 29, 2025, prior to its original maturity date.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $600 million 5.200% Senior Notes due 2030
catalysts.sentence: On June 20, 2025, the Company issued $600 million of Senior Notes due 2030 (the 2030 Senior Notes) that mature on July 1, 2030 and bear interest at a fixed rate of 5.200% per annum.

catalysts.event: Entered into new $2.0 billion revolving credit facility and $300 million term loan
catalysts.sentence: On September 30, 2025, the Company entered into a new credit agreement consisting of a new four-year $2.0 billion senior unsecured multicurrency revolving credit facility (the Revolving Credit Facility) and a three-year $300.0 million delayed draw term loan facility (the 2028 Term Loan).
On October 15, 2025, the Company redeemed, at par value, the $600.0 million of 5.250% Senior Notes with a scheduled maturity of January 15, 2026.
During the fourth quarter of 2025, we fully repaid the $428.5 million term loan (the 2026 Term Loan) prior to the August 8, 2026 maturity date.
